raw_text:
```json
{
  "claims": [
    "Assemblyman James Gallagher and Senator Megan Dahle requested $21.5 million to rebuild Paradise Elementary School.",
    "Reconstruction of Paradise Elementary School is scheduled to begin in the spring with a goal of finishing the first phase by August 2026.",
    "The $21.5 million funding is needed to complete construction and accommodate growing enrollment at Paradise Elementary School.",
    "Paradise Unified School District (PUSD) has sought assistance to avoid state penalties for not meeting school staffing requirements.",
    "Legislation, Assembly Bill 1438, was authored to extend PUSD’s staffing ratio waiver by at least 7 years.",
    "Without the waiver extension, PUSD may face over $150,000 in state penalties annually.",
    "High levels of trauma and enrollment growth are necessitating the addition of administrators at PUSD."
  ]
}
```
